name: skill-creator-v2
description: A production-grade meta-skill for creating, improving, evaluating, hardening, and packaging AI skills and skill groups.
author: Sergey Kostenchuk

scripts.test: node ./bin/skill-creator-v2.js --help && node ./bin/skill-creator-v2.js list-targets && node ./bin/skill-creator-v2.js install --target codex --dry-run --home ./tmp-home
